ip.description: IP address information for the ISP hop. Fields marked as PII-gated (`name`, `address`, `netmask`, and all `location` sub-fields) will be returned as the literal string `"REDACTED"` for callers that do not have the PII permission. `asn`, `aso`, and `version` are always returned regardless of PII access.

address.description: IP address. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

location.description: Geographic location information. All fields are returned as the literal string `"REDACTED"` for callers that do not have the PII permission.

city.description: City name. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

country_iso.description: Country ISO code. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

state_iso.description: State/province ISO code. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

zip.description: ZIP/postal code. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

name.description: Named IP address (reverse DNS hostname when available). Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

netmask.description: Network mask. Returned as `"REDACTED"` without PII permission.

version.description: IP version (`1` for IPv4, `2` for IPv6, `0` if unknown).

test_id.description: The test that generated this result.

time_start.description: Timestamp of when the ISP was observed.

200.description: List of ISPs observed for the device.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

parameters.description: Unique identifier for a specific test.

parameters.name: to

parameters.description: Time interval for aggregate time slots.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

deviceName.description: Name of the device that ran the test.

interval.description: The interval at which the Traceroute synthetic application test is set to run.

sampling.description: Specifies the sampling applied, if any, to the slots response. When sampled, results shown represent the first test run to the start of each sampling interval.
